creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 240674
yank-1.3.0.patch

Description:

* Update to 1.3.0
* Change MAINTAINER
* pet portfmt
* Change x11 option to CLIPBOARD option: CLIPBOARD is more descriptive.
* CLIPBOARD is enabled by default: users using this port will probably want to copy the selected entry to the clipboard.

ChangeLog: https://github.com/mptre/yank/blob/v1.3.0/CHANGELOG.md

* NEWS:
  - Add opt-in selection of one and only field.

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.1-RELEASE, amd64, CLIPBOARD tested)
